title: Artificial Intelligence Safety and Transparency Act
latest_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
committees: House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology
text: To establish federal artificial intelligence risk management standards, transparency reporting, and safety evaluations for high-impact AI systems.

title: Rural Broadband Infrastructure Improvement Act
latest_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
committees: Senate Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation
text: To provide grants for rural broadband deployment and telecommunications infrastructure upgrades.
